title: mdadm bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4.4-2.0.1]
- mdadm: Fix IMSM Raid assembly after disk link failure and reboot. [Orabug: 38317486]

[4.4-2]
- grow command can't update chunksize
- Resolves: RHEL-92288

[4.4-1]
- Update to mdadm 4.4 and latest upstream
- Resolves: RHEL-86676, RHEL-72803, RHEL-88793, RHEL-88791
full_text:
